div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Ambassador in France (Herrick)
div.p: 89. Your 80, March 23, 4 p.m. Will H. Hays is sailing [on] Leviathan today in order to take up directly questions raised by film regulations now under consideration. On his arrival you will, of course, render all appropriate assistance. Meanwhile, it is suggested that, if you see no objection, you inform Herriot that he is coming and ask that he be heard before the adoption of any regulations that may affect American film interests.
